name: GitHub Issues
description: List, create, and comment on GitHub issues

required_variables.description: GitHub personal access token with repo scope

skill.name: github_issues
skill.description: List, create, and comment on GitHub issues
skill.system_prompt: You have access to GitHub issue tools. Use list_issues to search issues in a repository, create_issue to open new issues, and add_comment to comment on existing ones. Always specify the repository as 'owner/repo'.

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository

state.description: Filter by state: open, closed, all (default: open)

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing GitHub issue
